heading: Office of Energy from Municipal Waste
label: 8839 Office of Energy from Municipal Waste

children.heading: Establishment in Department of Energy; appointment of Director
children.label: a Establishment in Department of Energy; appointment of Director
children.text: There is hereby established within the Department of Energy an Office of Energy from Municipal Waste (hereinafter in this section referred to as the “Office”) to be headed by a Director, who shall be appointed by the Secretary of Energy.
the research, development, demonstration, and commercialization activities authorized under this subchapter (including those authorized under ), andsection 8837 of this title
such other duties relating to the production of energy from municipal waste as the Secretary of Energy may assign to the Office.

children.heading: Consultations respecting implementation of functions
children.label: c Consultations respecting implementation of functions
children.text: In carrying out functions tranferred or assigned to the Office, the Secretary of Energy shall consult with the Administrator of the Environmental Protection Agency, the Secretary of Commerce, and the heads of such other Federal agencies, as appropriate.1So in original. Probably should be “transferred”.1

children.heading: Transfer of related functions and personnel from Department of Energy
children.label: d Transfer of related functions and personnel from Department of Energy
children.text: The Secretary shall provide for the transfer to the Office of the functions relating to, and personnel of the Department who are responsible for the administration of, programs in existence on , which relate to the research, development, demonstration, and commercialization of technologies for the recovery of energy from municipal waste.June 30, 1980
